display.purpose: Page titles. Deliberately restrained (≤~2.2rem) — a sanctuary doesn't shout.

body.purpose: Primary reading text; cap prose at 65–75ch.

label.purpose: Small uppercase kicker, used as a restrained accent — not above every section.

pixel.purpose: Companion speech and on-chain tx hashes only.

motion.name: ease
motion.purpose: Default expressive ease-out for lifts and reveals.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The main call to action — soft blue gradient, gentle lift on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 11px 18px; border: none; border-radius: 12px; font: 600 0.92rem/1 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; color: #fff; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #61afef, #4d9ce0); cursor: pointer; transition: transform 140ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), box-shadow 140ms ease, filter 140ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); filter: brightness(1.06); box-shadow: 0 10px 24px rgba(97,175,239,0.18); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(97,175,239,0.4); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0) scale(0.98); }

components.name: Danger / Panic Button
components.description: Soft-coral destructive / panic action — humane, never alarmist red.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-danger"><svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="4"/><path d="m4.9 4.9 4.2 4.2M14.9 14.9l4.2 4.2M14.9 9.1l4.2-4.2M9.1 14.9l-4.2 4.2"/></svg>Panic Button</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-danger { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 11px 18px; border: none; border-radius: 12px; font: 600 0.92rem/1 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; color: #fff; background: #e06c75; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 140ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), box-shadow 140ms ease; } .ds-btn-danger:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(224,108,117,0.25); } .ds-btn-danger:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(224,108,117,0.4); }

components.name: Web3 Secured Badge
components.description: Signature trust signal — green-tinted pill with a softly pulsing dot.
components.css: .ds-badge-web3 { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 6px 11px; border-radius: 999px; font: 600 0.76rem/1 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; color: #98c379; background: rgba(152,195,121,0.16); border: 1px solid rgba(152,195,121,0.4); } .ds-pulse { width: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 50%; background: #98c379; animation: dsPulse 2.4s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1) infinite; } @keyframes dsPulse { 0% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(152,195,121,0.55); } 70% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 7px transparent; } 100% { box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 transparent; } } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-pulse { animation: none; } }

components.name: Card
components.description: Primary content container — gentle tonal lift, soft shadow, lifts on hover.
components.html:
This week

Today's emotional weather

Your aggregated mood, gently visualized.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #2b3038; border: 1px solid #353b45; border-radius: 16px; padding: 24px; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.35), 0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.35); transition: transform 240ms cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1), box-shadow 240ms ease, border-color 240ms ease; } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); border-color: #3a414c; box-shadow: 0 18px 50px rgba(0,0,0,0.35), 0 6px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.35); } .ds-eyebrow { font: 700 0.72rem/1 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.14em; color: #5c6573; } .ds-card-title { margin: 8px 0 6px; font: 700 1.02rem/1.2 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: #f2f4f8; } .ds-card-body { margin: 0; font: 400 0.9rem/1.55 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; color: #8a93a3; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Calm input with a soft glow focus ring; placeholder held to AA contrast.
components.css: .ds-field { width: 100%; padding: 12px 14px; border-radius: 12px; background: #2c313a; border: 1px solid #3a414c; color: #d7dce5; font: 400 0.95rem/1.4 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: border-color 140ms ease, box-shadow 140ms ease; } .ds-field::placeholder { color: #8a93a3; } .ds-field:focus { outline: none; border-color: #61afef; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(97,175,239,0.14); }

components.name: Track Badge
components.description: Mental-health track tag — color-coded (social=blue, phobia=orchid, burnout=green).
components.html: Social Anxiety Burnout / Physical
components.css: .ds-track { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 6px 11px; border-radius: 999px; font: 600 0.76rem/1 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; border: 1px solid transparent; } .ds-track-social { background: rgba(97,175,239,0.14); color: #61afef; } .ds-track-burnout { background: rgba(152,195,121,0.16); color: #98c379; } .ds-track-phobia { background: rgba(198,120,221,0.16); color: #c678dd; }

components.name: Mood Aura (Calm)
components.description: Signature component — the breathing mood blob. Calm = slow, rounded, cool, breathing.
components.html:
Calm
78% balance
components.css: .ds-aura { position: relative; width: 200px; height: 200px; display: grid; place-items: center; } .ds-aura-blob { position: absolute; inset: 0; border-radius: 47% 53% 60% 40% / 45% 50% 50% 55%; background: radial-gradient(circle at 35% 30%, #61afef, #98c379); box-shadow: 0 0 80px 6px rgba(97,175,239,0.45); animation: dsMorph 9s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1) infinite, dsBreathe 7s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1) infinite; } .ds-aura-core { position: relative; z-index: 2; text-align: center; color: #fff; text-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.35); } .ds-aura-mood { font: 800 1.6rem/1 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: -0.02em; } .ds-aura-pct { font: 400 0.82rem/1.4 Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; opacity: 0.9; } @keyframes dsBreathe { 0%,100% { transform: scale(0.92); } 50% { transform: scale(1.08); } } @keyframes dsMorph { 0%,100% { border-radius: 47% 53% 60% 40% / 45% 50% 50% 55%; } 33% { border-radius: 60% 40% 45% 55% / 55% 45% 60% 40%; } 66% { border-radius: 40% 60% 55% 45% / 50% 60% 40% 50%; } } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-aura-blob { animation: none; } }

narrative.overview: MindVault is a sanctuary before it is software. Every screen exists to lower the user's heart rate, not raise it — because the person using it may be anxious, low, or in genuine distress. The system is built from breathing room, soft light, and warm reassurance: a place to exhale. Trust is the second pillar, shown rather than claimed: privacy and cyber-resilience speak through quiet, consistent signals — a steady Web3 Secure badge, a flashing encryption indicator, consent the user actively signs — never through walls of reassurance copy. It rejects clinical EHR sterility, cold corporate SaaS, and crypto hype alike.
keyCharacteristics: Sanctuary-first: generous spacing, soft drop shadows, 12–16px rounded corners everywhere.
Three full theme palettes (One Dark, Gruvbox, Material) driven entirely by CSS variables.
Breathing, organic motion; the mood Aura is the system's living heartbeat.
Quiet trust signals over loud reassurance.
Calm by default; agitation only when deliberately mirroring the user's anxious state.

rules.name: The Three-Haven Rule
rules.body: Every color is a CSS variable scoped to [data-theme]. Never hardcode a hex value in a component — if it can't be themed, it doesn't ship. All three palettes must clear the same contrast bar.

rules.name: The Coral-Not-Red Rule
rules.body: Distress, danger, and the anxious state use soft coral (#e06c75), never a harsh emergency red. The interface must stay humane even when it mirrors panic.

rules.name: The Meaningful-State Rule
rules.body: Green means safe, amber means caution, coral means stop/distress. State colors are never decorative.

rules.name: The Quiet-Display Rule
rules.body: Display type never exceeds ~2.2rem. Big shouting headlines belong to marketing pages, not a calming product surface.

rules.name: The Pixel-Sparingly Rule
rules.body: Press Start 2P appears only on the companion and on-chain hashes. It is seasoning, never a body or heading face.

rules.name: The Soft-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Shadows are diffuse and low-opacity — comfort, not drama. If a shadow looks crisp or dark, it's wrong for this system.

rules.name: The Glass-With-Purpose Rule
rules.body: Backdrop blur is reserved for sticky chrome (sidebar, top bar) and modal backdrops. Never apply glassmorphism decoratively to content cards.

dos: Do drive every color through CSS variables scoped to [data-theme]; keep all three palettes at AA contrast.
Do keep body and muted text at ≥4.5:1 (large text ≥3:1) — bump muted toward ink before sacrificing it.
Do use soft, diffuse, low-opacity shadows and 12–16px radii everywhere.
Do keep motion slow, rounded, and breathing; pair every animation with a non-motion cue and a full prefers-reduced-motion alternative.
Do communicate security with quiet, consistent signals (Web3 badge, encryption indicator, signed consent).
Do keep one primary action per screen; use progressive disclosure to protect a distressed user.
Do use soft coral (#e06c75) for distress/danger — humane, never alarmist.
donts: Don't make it look like clinical medical / EHR software — no sterile hospital blue-and-white, no dense data-entry forms, nothing that reads as a patient record.
Don't make it look like cold corporate SaaS — no dashboard-cream default, no hero-metric template, no endless identical icon-heading-text card grids.
Don't use the crypto/Web3 hype aesthetic — no neon gradients, 3D coins, or glowing hype styling.
Don't use border-left/border-right greater than 1px as a colored stripe accent on cards or list items (the current .quest-card::before 4px stripe is exactly this and should be reworked).
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text) or decorative glassmorphism on content.
Don't use harsh emergency red, flashing patterns, or time pressure — the user may be in distress.
Don't let gamification become childish or manipulative; keep streaks/rewards gentle and supportive.
Don't shout: display type stays ≤~2.2rem; this is a sanctuary, not a billboard.
